system.summary: Two brains; -1 to artifacts; two mental saves, but increase mental 1/2.

description.value: The mutant has two fully functioning brains, even if it does not have two heads. Between them, the mutant may possess as many as 3 additional mental mutations. The second brain gives a -1 bonus on all die rolls made to figure out ancient artifacts. Under mental attack, one brain may suffer the effect while the other keeps the mutant moving and acting normally. The mutant gets two mental saving throws, and if either one succeeds, the attack fails. Both brains use the same Mental Strength score rolled at character creation, but any Mental Strength increase gained by surviving mental attacks is earned at only half the normal rate.
